headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess KLA (KLAC) After Its Near 100% One Year Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether KLA's share price still reflects sensible value after a strong run, this article walks through the numbers so you can judge that for yourself. The stock last closed at US$1,344.55, with returns of 5.5% year to date and 99.7% over the past year, while the last 7 days and 30 days show declines of 12.4% and 6.8% respectively. Recent news around KLA has focused on its role within the semiconductor equipment space and how investor sentiment can shift quickly as...
